title: Gleam stdlib I/O + URI wrappers and sample workflow e2e
purpose: Implement remaining 13 gleam_stdlib BIFs (I/O, utility, URI), plus uri_string stubs, and un-ignore sample_workflow_e2e test to prove end-to-end Gleam workflow execution.
task: Implement 13 gleam_stdlib BIFs, 2 uri_string stubs, and verify sample workflow e2e.
boundaries: SHALL NOT implement full RFC 3986 URI parsing — stub with approximate splitting
SHALL stub uri_string functions as approximations
SHALL mark approximate stubs with inline notes for future replacement

requirements.title: gleam_stdlib I/O and utility wrappers (7 functions)
requirements.spec: Register: is_null/1, list/5, map_get/2, print/1, print_error/1, println/1, println_error/1.

requirements.title: URI wrappers + uri_string stubs (6 functions)
requirements.spec: Register gleam_stdlib: parse_query/1, percent_decode/1, percent_encode/1, uri_parse/1. Register uri_string: parse/1, dissect_query/1. Approximate stubs.
acceptance: uri_string:parse(<<"https://example.com/path?q=1">>) returns map with scheme, host, path, query

requirements.title: sample_workflow e2e test — un-ignore and verify
acceptance: Test loads all .beam files from test-workflows/sample/
Return value is a well-formed tuple
